title: DeCubes MoAnimations
description: Adds unofficial animations to select cobblemon that don't have any yet
body:
**DeCubes MoAnimations** is an unofficial resource pack for the Cobblemon mod that adds animations to Pokemon that currently lack them. This pack does not add any new Pokemon or change any spawns! Just animations!

All textures and models are pulled straight from the official mod! I do not own these models! I only created the animations!

### Included ###
- Kantonian Growlithe & Arcanine
- Deino, Zweilous
- Trapinch
- Grimer
- Regigigas
- Heracross
